title: AI ends turns passively — statement with no next step or question
failing_behavior: After answering a question (hours, price, staff availability, conflict), AI ends the turn with a bare statement and no follow-up. Customer is left waiting for the AI to do something. Conversation stalls.
root_cause: No explicit prompt instruction required the AI to close every turn with a question or forward-leading offer. Claude defaulted to informational responses without driving toward the next booking step.

conversation.content: We're open Monday through Saturday, 9 AM to 7:30 PM. We're closed on Sundays.
Yes, Helen works Tuesdays from 9 AM to 6 PM.

expected_behavior: After answering hours: 'We're open Mon–Sat, 9 AM–7:30 PM. Would you like to book an appointment?' After answering staff availability: 'Yes, Helen works Tuesdays 9 AM–6 PM. Would you like to schedule something with her?'
observed_behavior: AI gives accurate information but ends passively. No question, no next step. Customer must re-initiate every time.
code_areas: nailsalon/receptionist.js: _buildPrompt() — RESPONSE QUALITY — ALWAYS LEAD section after YOUR RULES
notes: Fix is purely prompt-level. Applies to all non-booking turns: hours, price, service info, staff availability. Booking turns already have structured flow (booking_offer, etc.) and are not affected. The 'NEVER end with a bare statement' rule and the required-patterns list are the key additions.
